description: Multiplayer voice defaults — host overrides in lobby before CREATE SESSION

modes.webrtc: In-game WebRTC — proximity + PTT or open mic (browser/Electron/Capacitor)
modes.discord: Discord voice channel link — opens Discord app (most compatible external)
modes.hybrid: In-game WebRTC + optional Discord parallel channel

notes: True Discord/TeamSpeak embed is not available in a generic web SPA — use external invite or built-in WebRTC.
Default transmission is PTT (V key) — avoids echo and works better on mobile with on-screen PTT.
Proximity uses player avatar position, or camera position in fly mode.
